title: Rebrand donation site for True Hope Foundation

requirements.summary: Update all landing page copy, headings, and descriptive text to reflect True Hope Foundation's mission and truehopefoundation.in domain
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays True Hope Foundation branding and mission
All text references appropriate to True Hope Foundation's cause
No references to Gaza or gaza.hdfund.org remain in visible copy
Domain-appropriate messaging throughout the landing page

file_operations.description: Replace all copy, headings, hero section text, impact sections, and descriptive content to reflect True Hope Foundation's humanitarian relief mission. Update page title, hero headline, subheadline, call-to-action text, impact statistics descriptions, and any Gaza-specific references with appropriate humanitarian relief messaging suitable for truehopefoundation.in domain.

requirements.summary: Generate and integrate new hero banner image for True Hope Foundation
acceptanceCriteria: New hero banner reflects humanitarian relief theme
Hero banner is displayed on the landing page

file_operations.description: Update the hero banner image reference to use the generated humanitarian relief hero banner at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-truehope.dim_1200x600.png. Replace the existing hero-banner.dim_1920x900.png reference with the new True Hope Foundation hero image, ensuring proper image loading and responsive display.

requirements.summary: Update campaign fundraising goal configuration for True Hope Foundation
acceptanceCriteria: Campaign goal is updated in frontend/src/config/campaign.ts
Goal amount is appropriate for a humanitarian relief campaign
Progress bar and campaign statistics reflect the new goal

file_operations.description: Update the campaign goal amount to an appropriate value for True Hope Foundation's humanitarian relief fundraising campaign. Set a realistic goal that aligns with humanitarian relief initiatives while maintaining the existing currency configuration and data structure.
